_comment: Native-vs-wasm workload spectrum. Each workload runs the SAME wasm duckdb:extension component + SAME SQL + SAME data two ways: native DuckDB + native ducklink extension (native-runner) vs the wasm DuckDB core (ducklink host CLI). 'rows' is informational (throughput). k_values MUST start at 0 (the pure-fixed-cost anchor); the orchestrator fits time = intercept + slope*K and reports slope as the marginal per-query cost.

workloads.setup: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE t_aba AS SELECT lpad(((i*123457)%1000000000)::VARCHAR, 9, '0') AS s FROM range(1000000) tt(i);
workloads.query: SELECT sum(CASE WHEN aba_validate(s) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM t_aba;

workloads.setup: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE t_txt AS SELECT md5(i::VARCHAR) AS s FROM range(1000000) tt(i);
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE t_long AS SELECT repeat(md5(i::VARCHAR), 8) AS s FROM range(1000000) tt(i);
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE prices AS SELECT i AS t, (sin(i/100.0)*50+100)::DOUBLE AS c FROM range(1000000) tt(i);
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE t_aba10 AS SELECT lpad(((i*123457)%1000000000)::VARCHAR, 9, '0') AS s FROM range(10000000) tt(i);
workloads.query: SELECT sum(CASE WHEN aba_validate(s) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM t_aba10;
